lines.speaker: Duke
lines.text: Open the gates! An ally wishes to pass!

lines.speaker: Duke
lines.text: King Awowogei has ordered me to offer you some advanced combat training. You can have two training sessions with me, so please choose the kind of training you'd like for your first session.

lines.speaker: Duke
lines.text: As you wish. Speak to me again if you change your mind.

lines.speaker: Duke
lines.text: I can offer you one more combat training session. What kind of training would you like?

lines.speaker: Duke
lines.text: Speak to me again if you change your mind.

lines.speaker: Duke
lines.text: I can offer you one more combat training session. What kind of training would you like?

lines.speaker: Duke
lines.text: This concludes the advanced combat training. I must return to my duties now - King Awowogei has put me in charge of the guard to replace Kruk.

lines.speaker: Duke
lines.text: Please excuse me; I have much to oversee now that King Awowogei has put me in charge of the guard to replace Kruk.
